title: Devtool Usage Analytics
summary: Analyze seat activation, retention, and workspace behaviors for developer-focused products.
knowledge_base: Devtool Usage Analytics is positioned as a Developer Product Analytics starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Analyze seat activation, retention, and workspace behaviors for developer-focused products.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on developer-tools, product, usage.
